title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Kozhikode

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Kozhikode
jsonLd.description:
IIM Kozhikode, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Kozhikode:
IIM Kozhikode is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
